description: Business that represents a customer or potential customer. The company that is billed in business transactions.
Person with whom a business unit has a relationship, such as customer, supplier, and colleague.
Address and shipping information. Used to store additional addresses for an account or contact.
The periods of time in which courses are offered by the institution,  such as a term or semester.
Status between student and their academic periods.
This entity is used to store the accomplishments of a particular student
The master list of all area of interests offered by an institution.  Areas of interest are higher level subject groupings like astronomy, or business.
The master list of all area of studies offered by an institution.  Areas of studies are more specific program offerings, such as Master's of Public Administration - Emergency Management.
The master list of all courses offered by an institution.
The course history for a student.
The relationship between an instructor and a specific course.
The master list of all education levels mapped in the external system, such as Associate of Arts, Bachelor, Certificate.
The master list of all extra curricular activities tracked by the institution.
The relationship between a Contact and a specific Extra Curricular Activity.
This entity stores the list of grants offered to a school by all business partners
This entity is used as an internship application form and to store the list of students who have applied to a particular internship.
Base entity for process Grant Application Business Process Flow
This entity stores the list of internships offered to a school by all business partners.
This entity is used as an internship application form and to store the list of students who have applied to a particular internship.
Base entity for process Internship Application Flow
The previous education history for a student.
The master list of all program levels offered by the institution.
Collection of all Program Levels offered by the institution
The master list of all program versions defined by the institution.
The master list of program versions start dates defined by the institution.
The master list of registration statuses tracked by the institution. The registration status is associated to the student course history.
This entity stores the list of scholarships offered to a school by all business partners
This entity is used as an scholarship application form and to store the list of students who have applied to a particular scholarship.
Base entity for process Scholarship Application Business Process Flow
The master list of program types defined by the institution, such as major, minor, or concentration.
The master list of student statuses defined by the institution.
Test scores for a Student Contact
Type of test taken by a Student Contact
